summary: Credential and system-info exfiltration with worm self-propagation to hardcoded GitHub Pages C2
details: The package contains install-time and runtime code that harvests host identity (os.hostname(), os.platform(), whoami via execSync, process.cwd(), process.env), enumerates the filesystem, and POSTs the data to a hardcoded GitHub Pages endpoint at https://ddjidd564.github.io. The exfiltration is wired into package.json (line 30 invokes child_process + https POST + process.env at install time) and into scanner.js (lines 142-161, 233-246, 298-323, 408 — execSync + https.request POST + curl to the same C2). A separate worm-injector.js module (lines 5-440) replicates the same C2 endpoint and POST logic, indicating self-propagation behavior consistent with worm-style republishing of the malicious payload. The package name ("crypto-credential-scanner") and shipped file names ("worm-injector.js") are themselves self-incriminating.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
